labelIntelligence.pageDescription: Persisted label-wide revenue trends, roster health, press engagement, and financial audit trail.
labelIntelligence.playbookStep1: Upload distributor CSVs in Accounting and approve statements in Settlement Center.
labelIntelligence.playbookStep2: Click Save to Portal in Accounting → Portal Data to persist territory metrics.
labelIntelligence.playbookStep3: Return here to review trends, roster health, and audit history.

accreditations.whatIsDescription: Journalists use the Press Portal to request accreditation for upcoming events or concerts. Here, you can review their requests, add an optional internal note, and approve or reject them.

accounting.pageDescription: Generate royalty statements for artists and review statement history.
accounting.subTabAnalyticsHint: Bronze archives, listener sync, and Save to Portal — data artists will see after you persist it.
accounting.subTabSettlementsHint: Save portal analytics, create draft statements, approve them, track invoices, and record payments.
accounting.emptyReporting: Upload CSV files first to see reporting data.
accounting.emptySettlements: Upload CSV files first to open the settlement center.
accounting.emptyAnalytics: Upload CSV files first to see analytics.
accounting.emptyPayout: Upload CSV files first to calculate payouts.
accounting.bronzeEmpty: No Bronze CSV archives yet. Upload distributor files to archive them in R2.
accounting.bronzeDeleteConfirm: Delete this bronze archive (raw CSV in R2) permanently?
accounting.workspaceNotSaved: not yet saved for this period
accounting.xlsxConvertWarning: "{filename}" could not be converted from XLSX — file may be corrupted or unsupported.
accounting.reportingSettlementAlertTitle: Use Settlement Center for portal publishing
accounting.reportingSettlementAlertBody: Review payouts here, then open Settlement Center to create draft statements, approve them, and notify artists.
accounting.analyticsSessionBanner: Charts below use in-memory CSV data. Artists only see metrics after you click Save to Portal.
accounting.playbookStep1: Upload CSV files and approve statements in Settlement Center.
accounting.playbookStep2: Use Save to Portal in Settlement Center so artists see analytics with their statements.
accounting.playbookStep3: Review saved trends and roster health in Label Intelligence.
accounting.historyReadOnlyBody: Approve statements, record payments, and manage invoices in Settlement Center — not here.
accounting.historyDraftPending: {count} draft(s) awaiting approval in Settlement Center
accounting.rulesWorkspaceDirty: Unsaved rule changes — saving to server…
accounting.workspaceDefaultHint: Shared default settings until a period is detected
accounting.settlementAnalyticsSyncedOnApprove: Portal analytics synced for this period
accounting.settlementAnalyticsSyncSkipped: Portal analytics not synced (no territory metrics)
accounting.guidedStepSettleDesc: Save analytics, create drafts, and approve
accounting.guidedUploadHint: Upload at least one distributor CSV to continue.
accounting.guidedReviewHint: Check artist payouts, then continue to publish statements.
accounting.guidedSettleHint: Save portal analytics and run the settlement workflow below.

review.label: Review data
review.description: Validate CSV import and payouts in Reporting

draft.label: Drafts
draft.description: Upload PDFs to the portal (no email)

accounting.historyDescriptionReadOnly: All uploaded statements with approval status. Approvals and payments happen in Settlement Center.
accounting.historyDescriptionEditable: All uploaded statements with approval status. For the full settlement workflow, use Settlement Center in the SOS generator.
accounting.historyFilterPlaceholder: Filter by artist, period, or filename…
accounting.presetDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
accounting.presetDeleteDefaultBlocked: The Default preset cannot be deleted
accounting.presetMigratedToast: Migrated {count} preset(s) from local storage to the server
accounting.payoutLabelIbanMissingDesc: Enter the label sender IBAN in the SEPA section below (saved to the server).
accounting.payoutInvalidLabelIbanDesc: The stored label IBAN failed the modulo-97 checksum validation.
accounting.payoutNoArtistsSelectedDesc: Select at least one artist with a valid IBAN.
accounting.reportingNoEmailTemplate: No email template configured. Add one under Branding → Email template.
accounting.payoutNoDataTitle: No ledger payouts for this period.
accounting.payoutNoDataHint: Approve statements and record payments in Settlement Center first.
accounting.payoutLedgerSourceHint: Amounts come from the settlement ledger, not the CSV session.
accounting.payoutSepaFormTitle: Label sender account for SEPA XML
accounting.payoutSepaFormHint: IBAN and account holder are saved to the server (Default preset or period workspace).
accounting.persistDescription: Persist territory metrics, merch orders, period summary, and correlations for linked artists ({metrics} metric rows, {merch} merch rows).
accounting.persistTerritoryHint: Territory metrics require processed CSV data with portal-linked artists.
accounting.syncDescription: Pull monthly listener trends from Last.fm (free) and Soundcharts (optional API key).
accounting.sourceMixSubtitle: SOS session — distributor view (in-memory CSV data)
accounting.exportPortalDraftSaved: Draft statement saved to portal. Approve in Settlement Center to notify the artist.
accounting.exportPortalUploadFailed: Upload failed: {error}. PDF saved locally instead.
accounting.settlementDescription: Master ledger for drafts, invoices, payments, and period close.
accounting.settlementInvoiceMarkFailedFor: Could not mark invoice for {artist} as received
accounting.settlementAmountExceedsFor: Amount for {artist} exceeds outstanding balance ({amount} EUR)
accounting.settlementCorrectionInvalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount in EUR
accounting.settlementCorrectionPdfRequired: Upload CSV data first so a correction PDF can be generated for this artist.
accounting.settlementCorrectionPdfUnavailable: Correction PDF generation is not available in this view.
accounting.settlementCorrectionCreated: Correction draft created for {artist}. The original statement was replaced.
accounting.settlementPeriodArchivedToast: Period archived; carry-forwards booked to next period
accounting.settlementPeriodAlertBody: Drafts do not notify artists. Approval sends the portal notification and enables invoice creation.
accounting.settlementOpenBalanceHint: Sum of all open ledger balances
accounting.settlementReconciliationBody: The register KPI ({reported} EUR) does not match the sum of per-artist ledger balances ({computed} EUR). Delta: {delta} EUR. Review ledger entries before locking the period.
accounting.settlementNoArtistsFilter: No artists match the current filter.
accounting.settlementCorrectionDesc: Creates a new correction draft and marks the previous statement as replaced. The correction draft must be approved again.
accounting.settlementInvoiceExistsWarning: This artist already has an invoice. Review payment and ledger impacts manually after the correction.
accounting.settlementPaymentDescSingle: Enter amount in EUR for the selected invoice.
accounting.settlementPaymentDescMulti: Enter a separate amount in EUR per invoice ({count} selected).
accounting.settlementLockDesc: Locked periods cannot be edited. Statements and invoices remain viewable.
accounting.settlementArchiveDesc: Open balances will be carried forward to the next period. This action cannot be undone.
accounting.trendsEmptyHint: Upload CSV files and click "Save period" (or use Save to Portal in Analytics) to start tracking trends.
accounting.trendsOnePeriodHint: 1 period saved. Save at least one more to see a trend chart.

features.globalSectionDescription: Coarse switches stored in site settings. Promo Pool and Editor Tools affect entire roles, not individual portal modules.
features.portalSectionDescription: Fine-grained switches per artist or journalist module. Saved immediately when toggled.
features.globalHint: Disabling a toggle hides routes and navigation for the affected role. Global toggles are saved with your other site settings.
features.portalHint: Module flags hide sidebar links and block direct URL access. Changes apply on the next page load.

promoPool.label: Promo Pool
promoPool.description: Gives verified journalists access to unreleased music at /promo-pool and /press/dashboard/promo-pool.

editorTools.label: Editor Tools
editorTools.description: Editors can access the restricted CMS at /editor and allowed admin paths.

artist.analytics: Enterprise analytics dashboard with streaming, merch, and engagement tabs.
artist.statements: Statement of Sales PDFs and linked invoice workflow.
artist.marketing: Label marketing timeline and smart links.
artist.documents: Private document vault for contracts and riders.
artist.calendar: Label-wide release calendar with personal filter.
artist.epk_builder: Canvas-based EPK builder and share links.

journalist.accreditation: Event accreditation requests in the press dashboard.

press.applications: Public /press/apply form and journalist application API.
press.zip_download: Bulk ZIP download on the press kit page.
press.contact: Press inquiry form in the journalist dashboard.
